Wedding Budget Calculator

Plan your wedding budget with recommended spending percentages. Enter your total budget to see how much to allocate to each category.

FAQ

How much does a wedding cost?

The average US wedding costs $30,000-$35,000. Costs vary widely by location, guest count, and choices made.

What is the biggest wedding expense?

The venue and catering typically account for 40-50% of the total budget, making it the largest single expense.

How many guests can I afford?

Divide your catering budget by $100-$200 per person (average cost per guest) to estimate your guest count.
